results.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark 1.1 to Challenge OpenAI and Anthropic in AI Coding Tools Race
results.description: Meta launched Muse Spark 1.1 on Thursday, an agentic AI model for coding priced at $1.25 per million input tokens to compete directly with Anthropic and OpenAI. Mark Zuckerberg posted on X for the first time in three years to announce the launch.

results.title: TCS Q1 revenue rises 2.7%, company adds over 9,000 to workforce
results.description: TCS reported June-quarter revenue of $7.6 billion, showing a modest year-on-year increase. The company added over nine thousand employees, marking significant workforce expansion. Consolidated net profit saw a sequential decline after a one-time legal charge. Operating margins decreased due to annual wage hikes, with a goal to return to twenty-five percent. TCS expects AI to evolve jobs rather than eliminate them, creating new roles.

results.title: Mbappe and Dembele Fire France Past Morocco 2-0 Into World Cup Semifinal
results.description: Kylian Mbappe scored his 8th tournament goal in the 60th minute and Ousmane Dembele added a second six minutes later as France beat Morocco 2-0 at Gillette Stadium. Les Bleus advance to the 2026 World Cup semifinals against Spain or Belgium in Arlington on Tuesday.

results.title: Defensive stocks to invest in if the AI bubble bursts
results.description: The article highlights companies that could prove resilient if enthusiasm surrounding AI stocks fades. It examines sectors and businesses that may offer more stable earnings and downside protection during a technology market correction.... Article link

results.title: Ali Khamenei Buried Amid Fresh US-Iran Fighting
results.description: Ali Khamenei was buried in his home city of Mashhad in eastern Iran on Friday.
